import pytest
from source import levenshtein

def test_levenshtein_equal_first_char():
    """When the first characters match, the distance should not increase."""
    source = "abc"
    target = "abd"
    expected_distance = 1  # only the last character differs
    assert levenshtein(source, target) == expected_distance, (
        f"Expected distance {expected_distance} for '{source}' vs '{target}', "
        f"but got {levenshtein(source, target)}"
    )
